title: Air Wick Automatic Air Freshener Freshmatic Spray Refills: Crisp Linen & Lilac, Island Mango, Pink Sweet Pea, Purple Lavender Meadow, Satin & Moon Lily, White Vanilla Bean - Mixed fragerence 6 x 250ml
features: Scents - Crisp Linen & Lilac, Island Mango, Pink Sweet Pea, Purple Lavender Meadow, Satin & Moon Lily, White Vanilla Bean - One of Each
Automatically releases fragrance into your home.
Bursts of fragrance to constantly freshen your home and neutralise odours.
description: Product description One spritz of Air Wick Freshmatic Max Air Freshener is enough to fill a room. Air Wick Freshmatic Automatic Sprays release bursts of continuous fresh fragrance so your home always smells welcoming. Just set the air freshener to your preferred fragrance intensity setting and enjoy while the crisp linen and lilac refill neutralises odours. Fragrances your home for up to 70 days per refill when on low setting. Ingredients Contains citral. May produce an allergic reaction. Contains d-limonene. May produce an allergic reaction.
